facebook.caption:
POV: you finally found the good Bún Quậy.

Bún quậy THIỆN MỸ on Đường Trần Hưng Đạo is the real deal. 4.7 stars across 402 reviews. That score holds for a reason. This is Phu Quoc's signature noodle dish done right, not the watered-down tourist version.

Go early. Locals fill this place fast.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Slurping Bún Quậy at Bún quậy THIỆN MỸ. 402 people rated this 4.7 stars. You can taste why in the first bowl. 103 Đường Trần Hưng Đạo. Don't walk past it.
